name: Panty & Stocking with Garterbelt.
description:
Can't promise it'll be good or have great memory, but I've been obsessed with the series lately and mostly made this for myself. I tried making the dialog feel realistic for the characters so enjoy my amazing writing.

Because of that, it's not particularly made for smut but it should be fun for shenanigans. Be an oc, be a self insert, be a scary ass ghost. Go nuts.

Enjoy these crazy angel bitches.

P.s I have no plans to add the femboy angels or season 2 content. Not because they're not iconic but because I can't be bothered to add anything else.

Characters included/mentioned:

Panty

Stocking

Garterbelt

Chuck

Brief

Scanty

Kneesocks

Fastener

Judgement

Ghosts.
creator: Lizardfemboy
